allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const src = fs.readFileSync\(''src/i18n.tsx'', ''utf8''\); const keys = [''About Lightlab'',''Where Strategy'',''Meets Craft'',''multiply human ambition'',''not automate it away'',''compounding growth assets'',''Work with us'',''Let us build'',''something together'',''Open for Q2 2026'',''Start a conversation'',''How we operate'',''Strategic clarity'',''Crafted execution'',''Compounding systems'']; keys.forEach\(k => { if \(src.includes\(k\)\) console.log\(''FOUND:'', k\); else console.log\(''MISSING:'', k\); }\);")
